meta.title: About — NomeSito
meta.description: Discover the story, mission and team behind NomeSito.

hero.title: Building free tools together
hero.subtitle: NomeSito was born from the belief that open technology is a common good. We are a group of volunteers who believe in the power of distributed collaboration.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We want to make quality digital tools accessible to everyone, without economic or technical barriers. Everything we build is open source, documented and designed to last.

openness.title: Openness
openness.description: Everything we produce is public, from code to internal discussions. Transparency is not an option — it's our starting point.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: The best ideas come from the meeting of different perspectives. We welcome contributions from anyone, regardless of experience.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We design with everyone in mind: clear documentation, inclusive interfaces and tools that work even on slow connections.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We build for the long term. We prefer considered decisions over quick solutions that create technical or human debt.

team.title: The team
team.subtitle: We are a group distributed across Italy. We coordinate remotely and meet up when we can.

founded.title: The origins
founded.description: The project started from a Discord conversation between four people who had never met in person.

firstRelease.title: First public release
firstRelease.description: After months of late-night work, we publish the first stable version. Within a week, the first 200 GitHub stars arrive.

community.title: The community is born
community.description: We open the Discord server and organise the first online event. The community reaches 500 people within a few months.

today.title: We keep growing
today.description: The project is maintained by a team of volunteers and used by thousands of people. And we are only at the beginning.

cta.title: Want to be part of all this?
cta.subtitle: Whether you want to write code, improve documentation or simply say hello — you are welcome.
